_comment_en_us: Example 03 demonstrates reusable GUI interactions. The key idea is to define a reusable interaction block first, then invoke it from a scene.
_comment_zh_cn: 示例 03 演示可复用 GUI 交互。核心思路是先定义一段可复用交互，再在场景中调用它。

defaults._comment_en_us: defaults can provide shared values to all steps inside this interaction definition.
defaults._comment_zh_cn: defaults 可用于给这段交互定义里的所有步骤提供共享默认值。

steps._comment_en_us: Capture and render the furnace GUI as a live snapshot. The id is later used as a parent reference.
steps._comment_zh_cn: 把熔炉 GUI 作为 live snapshot 渲染出来。这里的 id 会在后续步骤里作为父级引用。

steps._comment_en_us: Highlight a rectangular area inside the GUI snapshot and attach explanatory text to it.
steps._comment_zh_cn: 在 GUI 快照内部高亮一个矩形区域，并为它附加说明文字。

interactionDefinitions._comment_en_us: This reusable interaction can be referenced by multiple scenes. It is the recommended way to avoid repeating complex GUI overlay steps.
interactionDefinitions._comment_zh_cn: 这段可复用交互可以被多个场景引用。对于复杂 GUI 演示，推荐用这种方式避免重复书写同样的步骤。

scenes.title: Example 03: GUI Interaction
scenes._comment_en_us: This scene uses a vanilla furnace so the GUI behavior is predictable and easy to test.
scenes._comment_zh_cn: 这里使用原版熔炉作为组件，这样 GUI 行为更稳定，也更容易测试。

operations._comment_en_us: Sets up the logical base platform.
A slightly smaller scale leaves enough room on screen for the GUI overlay.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 把场景缩小一点，给 GUI 叠层留出足够的屏幕空间。

operations._comment_en_us: Build a simple floor so the furnace is not floating in the preview.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 铺一个简单地面，避免熔炉在预览里悬空。

operations._comment_en_us: Place the furnace block that the text and GUI interaction will point to.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 放置熔炉方块，后面的文本和 GUI 交互都会指向它。

operations._comment_en_us: Pause before introducing the GUI sequence.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 在 GUI 演示开始前先停顿一下。

operations.text: This scene invokes a reusable GUI interaction definition.
operations._comment_en_us: This text explains that the next step is not hardcoded inline, but comes from a reusable interaction definition.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 这段文字说明下一步并不是直接内联写死，而是来自一段可复用交互定义。

operations._comment_en_us: Invoke the reusable interaction. The interaction field points to the previously defined interaction id.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 调用可复用交互。interaction 字段指向前面定义好的交互 id。

operations._comment_en_us: Leave the GUI visible long enough for reading and inspection.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 让 GUI 多停留一段时间，方便阅读和检查。
